ue,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【在成为极夜之都前，它的名字曾是「家」。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"E-023的夜晚灯火通明，一盏盏灯好似银河中的星星，起组成了一望无垠的绚烂银河。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在一栋几百米高的标志建筑屋顶，三个小身影坐在屋檐边，满脸愁容。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「要不…」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"小蒂法丝弱弱的开口刚想说点什么就被打断，他气鼓鼓的瞪着小弥瑟亚一脸不服。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「取名废不配取名。」小弥瑟亚一脸不屑的说道。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哼！文化课我可是班上前三名，而你是倒数！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「行了行了，你们俩别吵了，好好想名字。」小蒂芙尼两只手分别压着一个少年，用力揉乱了他们的头发。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哼，叫伊瑟第一帮派不是挺好的。」小弥瑟亚手托着下巴看着底下的灯火，毫不遮掩的在两人面前展示着自己的野心。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「还说我呢，就你这名字！是嫌学校注意不到我们吗！」小蒂法丝叉着腰站了起来，「更何况你不要忘了我们的初衷，我们就只是……想要个家而已。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"三人都沉默了下来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伊瑟很大，大到连蜃都这样的大城市都只是伊瑟的一个小方块。但是这么大的伊瑟，却没有他们三人认可的容身之所。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"学校很好，但不是他们要的家，他们见过人类的家，很温馨很快乐，他们也想要…·只是，现在不止他们三人，还有许多和他们志同道合的异格者，一起寻找家的异格者。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那就叫伊瑟第一大家庭。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「难听！还说我取名废！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"眼看着两人要打起来，蒂芙尼头疼的揪着两人的后脖领，「别吵了，我想好了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「叫什么？」小弥瑟亚和小蒂法丝闻言同时转头看向蒂芙尼。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「极夜之家。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"小蒂芙尼看着E-023的夜晚，看着那条银河，笑着开口：「就叫极夜之家！要让那些和我们一样的异格者，不论何时，即便是夜晚也能找到我们，我们不仅是他们的庇护，也是他们的家人！」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【不论离家多远，「家」的灯火总是温暖地亮着，等待每个回家的人。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「叮~叮叮——咔——」巨型结构建筑中，A-01楼，数万个牢房门应声打开。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"弥瑟亚左右活动了脖颈，踏出门口时和不远处的白发少年对了一下眼神，顺着人流来到了放风场。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哈罗哈罗，这里这里。」刚才对视的白发少女，也就是蒂法丝蹦跳着吸引弥瑟亚的注意力。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「都安排好了？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「当然，「针」已经好好的插，进，去了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"蒂法丝单手叉腰，笑着歪了歪头。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"弥瑟亚顺着蒂法丝歪头的方向看到不远处那几个略显呆板的狱卒，淡淡说道。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「该拿的情报都拿到了，就今天吧，别让你姐久等了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「终于要走了吗？」蒂法丝伸了伸懒腰，「不过今天看管的狱卒格外少，从感应来看，都朝着另一个地方汇聚。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哼，管他们到底有什么阴谋，如果妨碍到我们全部打倒就好。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"蒂法丝闻言，无所谓的耸了耸肩。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「嘟————」突然，警报声响彻全场，两人了然的对视一眼。意外真的发生了，不过对于他们来说，这可是一个「好消息」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"弥瑟亚冲着少女扬了扬头，「走吧，该回家了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「恩，回家！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【但是，曾经的「家」已经远去，成为了一个破碎的梦。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"人，到处都是乱糟糟的人……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"惊恐的人群不断往外逃离，熔断蔓延至大楼，空间开始分崩离析……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在建筑的二层，弥瑟亚打倒了一队又一队前来抓捕他们的人，即便是强悍如他，都逐渐有些疲惫。他已经分不清楚对面的敌人究竟是E.O.S.还是那群操控着熔断生物的神秘人，但已经无所谓了，他的剑会指向每一个不是极夜之都成员的人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"也包括那几个「叛徒」。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"挥了挥巨剑，弥瑟亚看到了建筑外的情况，也看到了外面已经被毁了一半的极夜之都招牌，他沉着脸继续向上行进。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"E.O.S的突然发难已经出乎了弥瑟亚和蒂芙尼的意料，而另一个势力的插手，却是让他们直接演变成了武装冲突。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"现在没时间去调查那第三方势力到底有什么目的，弥瑟亚只想带着蒂芙尼和蒂法丝离开这里，只要家人好好的，他们随时都可以重建极夜之都。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"战斗，从白天打倒了黑夜，曾经让弥瑟亚他们都自豪的灯火辉煌的夜，在今晚，却是一片黑暗……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而他们的灯，再也不会亮起了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"蒂芙尼在动乱中音讯全无，没人知道她究竟去向何方、是不是还活在伊瑟的某个地方。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"三盏相互依偎的灯，徒留另外两盏茫然失措，也不再温暖……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「律条」诞生了，弥瑟亚不想再去维系和任何人的关系，只遵守「律条」的筛选，不论是对别人还是对自己。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他将全部精力放在了提升实力上，只要够强，比任何人都强，就一定能够保护自己在意的一切。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"输出"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，爆伤，爆伤/攻击加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"pve表现被夜离力压一头，pvp打肉队是一个不错的选择"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12洞悉穿刺+8狂怒+爆裂利刃"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"白撩武者"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_277/50364/842288/2025/7/18/677357.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"voJJxgLl9kAVieIP","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
